use_cases: Split-screen comparison views with dramatic visual separator
Feature showcase sections with animated lightning effects
Product comparisons with high-impact visual divider
Hero sections requiring dynamic animated dividers
ai_summary: A split-screen component featuring an animated electric arc divider with WebGL shaders and multiple glow layers. Creates dramatic visual separation between content panels with smooth multi-frequency wave animations and customizable colors. Best for landing pages and feature showcases requiring high visual impact.
